Acta v0.2.0-pilot record · Generated from accepted canonical state (flows/process-slug.md) after explicit acceptance (chat — flow verified and confirmed) · Never generated from browser state.

decision record · ACCEPTED

Verified process flow

One paragraph: what the flow shows and that it was verified as the shared understanding.

Verification

Decision flow-verification

confirm-accurate — How does this process actually flow, end to end?

Rationale: Each edge was walked against the source.. Accepted via chat — explicit confirmation.

The flow

Every navigation walks left to right; the branch at “tag known?” separates the normal render from the empty-state path, and “clear filter” is the recovery route back to the full catalog.

The same flow, in words

Normal path

  1. each step of the happy path, in words

The decision

  1. what the branch decides and on what evidence

Failure path

  1. what actually happens when it goes wrong

Recovery path

  1. how the system or user gets back to good

Unresolved at acceptance

  • anything the flow deliberately leaves open

Sources

  1. [E1] the code or documents the flow was traced from

Acta is a print-first engineering record. Fact = directly supported; Inference = reasoned from evidence; Simplification = deliberately reduced model. This record renders accepted canonical state only; open decisions live in the companion instrument.
